text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As the mighty All-Rounder, Agnes<n>Digital has
dominated her first three<n>years in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There is nothing left for her to<n>conquer, yet her
gaze is locked on the<n>top of a ramp.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A great sage once said that walking<n>your path
means being true to<n>yourself...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I have climbed every ramp there is,<n>Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But once you've reached the top,<n>where does that
path lead? After you<n>finish climbing, what comes
next?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A conventional answer. But take a<n>look at this
conundrum through the<n>eyes of a fanatic.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Lower yourself as if in worship and,<n>from there,
follow the trajectory of<n>the ramp.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I stoop down just as she asks and<n>look up the
ramp to find...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The sky. The road up leads to the<n>sky.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Can you see it—the path I have yet to<n>conquer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'll cross the skies and take on the<n>whole world!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So, you're really leaving. Good luck<n>out there,
Digital.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm astonished that you set your<n>sights on
running internationally. I<n>hadn't heard even a
whisper of such<n>a grand ambition before.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's only natural I didn't mention<n>it before. I
mean, the idea just came<n>to me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I'm the All-Rounder! That means I<n>have to
conquer every racecourse<n>there is!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That includes every racecoursearound the world. In fact, I can't trulycall myself that until I've won allaround the world, can I?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Now that you mention it, that<n>makes sense.
You're incredible,<n>Digital!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Anyone can see she's incredible at a<n>single
glance. ...But Agnes Digital<n>herself knows there's
an even<n>bigger reason.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But being the All-Rounder isn't the<n>only reason I
want to travel the world.<n>I have this... absurdly
intense feeling...<n>that cannot be contained...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What is this feeling? Whatever could<n>it be,
Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: As her partner, I speak for her loud<n>and clear.
choice_data_list:
WE WANT TO MEET ALL THE UMAMUSUME IN
THE WORLD!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat?! All the Umamusume... inthe whole world?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Interesting. You've aggrandized<n>indulgence to its
most extreme<n>heights. So, that is the desire you
wish to sate?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's right. All I want is to see cute<n>Umamusume
that are even stronger<n>than me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I wanna chase all of them, run by<n>their side, and
then connect with<n>them! It's an urge I can't
contain!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's why... I have to go!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I understand. In which case, I pray<n>thee go forth
hale and hearty. But<n>know this...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There are many rulers abroad whose<n>strength
rivals that of even the<n>Overlord—the Trade Hawk of
Hong<n>Kong, and the Oil Tycoon of Dubai, to<n>name
a few.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However versatile you may be, your<n>opponents
will have the home<n>advantage. Are you certain you
can<n>win?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
S-sure, racers abroad might be more<n>comfortable
on their home terrain...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But I'll have an advantage too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Because wherever I go, there'll be<n>precious Umas
waiting! So long as<n>that's true, there's no limit to
what I<n>can do!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And on top of that...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: There's more?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Actually, the last bit's not<n>important. It
probably isn't worth<n>mentioning...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(On top of that, I have Opera O's,<n>Doto's, and
many other's blessings.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (And I'll always have them to support<n>me.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: All right, Trainer—my partner in<n>crime—let's go!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna travel the world with my<n>dear comrade
in arms to see the<n>things I love!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't get more exhilarating than<n>this! If we
keep this up, then the<n>world will be our
all-you-can-simp<n>buffet!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital sets off on her journey<n>with her
head held high and proud. As<n>a result...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital is in the lead! She's<n>done it! An
effortless victory in Hong<n>Kong! Her skill knows
no bounds!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital snatches an<n>overwhelming victory in
Dubai,<n>piercing through the arid heat!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O! Did you see Digital?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Her feats are truly<n>astounding. She's won
her way<n>through country after country without<n>so
much as a glance back home.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It appears there is no path ill-suited to<n>her.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: You don't think she's tired?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: She will not fall at the hands of<n>exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For she is the All-Rounder, traveling<n>the world with
a love for Umamusume<n>unmatched by any.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital's passion is not bound<n>by
international borders. Where her<n>heart leads, she
goes running.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Many racers have achieved victory<n>abroad, but
only the All-Rounder could<n>dash to and fro so
completely<n>unfettered.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: OOOOHOOHOO! PRAISE BE FOR<n>UMAMUSUMEEE!
